# Include file with variables used in recipes (second variant)
# Originally tested EOF ending a variable (no trailing newline in deps file),
# but txtar always adds trailing newlines. Kept as a duplicate include test.
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# Variable extracmdarg and deps are set in include.
# Test if extracmdarg is set for recipes
<./deps

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar $extracmdarg

two:
	$extracmdarg rebar
-- deps --
deps = one two
extracmdarg = gopher
-- expected --
two: gopher rebar
one: process bar gopher
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
